---
title: "Reflection"
---

## Reflection

This ePortfolio project has helped me develop practical skills in web development, version control, and data analysis.

### Skills Developed

Throughout this project, I learned how to use Quarto to build a structured website and present my work professionally. I also developed my understanding of Git and GitHub by committing changes regularly and managing my project step by step.

In addition, I improved my Python skills by creating projects that use data analysis and visualisation. I learned how to use libraries such as pandas and matplotlib to organise data and present it clearly through charts.

### Challenges Faced

One of the main challenges I faced was setting up Python and ensuring that my code executed correctly within Quarto. I also encountered issues with file structure and navigation, particularly when linking pages correctly within the website.

However, by troubleshooting errors and following a step-by-step approach, I was able to resolve these issues and improve my confidence in using these tools.

### What I Learned

This project helped me understand the importance of organising files properly, writing clean code, and presenting information clearly. I also learned how important it is to test and debug issues when working with web technologies and programming tools.

### Future Development

In the future, I would like to expand my skills further by creating more advanced data analysis projects and improving the design of my website. These skills will be useful for both my academic work and future career opportunities, as they demonstrate my ability to combine technical knowledge with professional presentation.
